Row.Text: +1 [icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food, [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production, and [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold on [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortifications in all Settlements. Acts as a [icon:CITY_FORTIFIED] Fortified District that must be conquered. Ageless. Must be placed on Rough Terrain.

+1 [icon:YIELD_FOOD] Food, [icon:YIELD_PRODUCTION] Production, and [icon:YIELD_GOLD] Gold on [icon:Action_Fortify] Fortifications in all Settlements. Acts as a [icon:CITY_FORTIFIED] Fortified District that must be conquered. [N]Must be placed on Rough Terrain.
